items.title: If James Dolan holds firm on his latest message, then Mitchell Robinson is about to leave the Knicks.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
If James Dolan holds firm on his latest message, then Mitchell Robinson is about to leave the Knicks.

In that case, the Celtics should do what they can to acquire him. Included: Boston's top competition for Robinson.
hardwoodhoudini.com/knicks-lates...

media.title: Knicks' latest messaging signals Celtics could poach Mitchell Robinson
media.description: After James Dolan's latest comments, the Celtics acquiring Mitchell Robinson to fortify their center position is suddenly a realistic offseason possibility.

items.title: Wrote about De’Aaron Fox, and three things we know:
items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt:
Wrote about De’Aaron Fox, and three things we know:

1. The Spurs’ trade for him was good, and they’d do it over again.

2. They wouldn’t have made the Finals without him.

3. They will have to move on from him eventually, and it might be this summer.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Why the Spurs might face a big decision with De’Aaron Fox this summer
media.description: Like many other teams that make a leap like the Spurs just did, they’re going to have to make some big decisions regarding their allocation of resources.

items.title: New #Magic coach Sean Sweeney told me and @philiprr.bsky.social he’s not yet sure who’ll coach Orlando’s summer league squad and he’ll figure that out the next few days.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
New #Magic coach Sean Sweeney told me and @philiprr.bsky.social he’s not yet sure who’ll coach Orlando’s summer league squad and he’ll figure that out the next few days.

“(I’ve) coached plenty of summer league games. I remember coming to summer league back here when it was in Orlando.”
